name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: We need to unseat Adam Kinzinger
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b5d27e6bc59a/we-need-to-unseat-adam-kinzinger?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Adam Kinzinger is one of the House's most anti-woman, anti-LGBTQ members. He has supported restricting access to abortions for rape survivors, made a career of open hostility toward trans people, and voted against the Equality Act.

At our debate last weekend, the moderators opened with a question about the ERA. Kinzinger skipped this vote - indefensible to start - and then spent his two minutes defending his negligence. He said the ERA was unnecessary, and suggested that women are doing fine.

Tell it to the Black trans women who are being slain. Tell it to the domestic violence survivors living with men who harm them because they need the health insurance afforded to them by their marriage. While you're at it, tell it to the families of women who have been murdered by their partners because of loopholes in gun safety legislation.

We need to unseat this misogynist, and we need to do it now.

[Can you chip in to help me replace him?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=628a0baa0f&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: It's been 48 hours, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Trump's hit a new low in modern American politics. |
---
Hi friend,

**It's been 48 hours, and my opponent, David Perdue, has yet to condemn President Trump for emboldening white supremacists and encouraging ultra-right wing extremists to intimidate voters during Tuesday's debate.**

The President's conduct during the debate -- and over the past four years, for that matter -- is deeply dangerous. It's a new low in modern American politics.

And yet Perdue has backed Trump time and time again. No wonder he's considered "Trump's favorite Senator."

**I'm not holding my breath waiting for integrity from Senator David Perdue._This is a man who publicly prayed for Barack Obama to suffer while he was President._**

**My opponent is every bit as complicit as Donald Trump in fanning the flames of extremism and racism.**

**[The people of Georgia deserve better. Friend, will you support my campaign to defeat this spineless and corrupt politician?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2d49/5b2c1286/341db175/25f20e49/2242756312/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_10_01_j_wsup?refcode=em_2020_10_01_j_wsup")**
| | [DONATE $20 NOW >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2d49/5b2c1286/341db175/25f20e48/2242756312/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_10_01_j_wsup?refcode=em_2020_10_01_j_wsup&amount=20")
---
| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2d49/5b2c1286/341db175/25f20e49/2242756312/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_10_01_j_wsup?refcode=em_2020_10_01_j_wsup")

Thank you for all you do, friend.

With love,

Jon

subject: Join Mike Siegel TX-10 & Bill McKibben from 350.org Friday Night!
body:
Join Environmentalists Bill McKibben, Jaynee A. Welty & Craig Nazor, and our own, Roza Calderon for a chat! | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=693dc1bbaf&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
## **ENVIRONMENTALISTS FOR MIKE SIEGEL**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=8ce2e96558&e=66979298f9)
---
| _Hosted by: __Roza Calderón, Bill McKibben, Jaynee A. Welty & Craig Nazor_
---
|
---
| **Join us this Friday, October, 2nd 2020, from 5:00 pm to 6:00 pm CDT for a conversation about the environment.**

Advocating for a Green New Deal is of particular importance to Mike. He has been endorsed by a number of environmental advocacy groups, including the 350 Action, the Sierra Club and the Sunrise Movement.

Additionally our Texas Youth Climate Coalition has endorsed Mike's campaign because he is the environmental champion we need to fight for Texas 10th Congressional District. Current representative, Michael McCaul (R) has been in the pockets of big oil and gas for too long - his time is up this November!

---
| [RSVP HERE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=6e27e9d050&e=66979298f9 "RSVP HERE")
---
|
---
|
### **TEXAS YOUTH
ENVIRONMENTAL COALITION**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9aa276e496&e=66979298f9)
---
|
#### [Only 9 House wins are needed to secure Independent redistricting in Texas!](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3a2b536b0a&e=66979298f9)

We've built a strong coalition in Texas that will not only ensure we flip the State House, but our work will make the difference for candidates running for U.S. Congress, U.S. Senate, and the President!

Future Generations Texas has built a statewide progressive coalition of youth-led organizations who are fighting #ForTheFuture of Texas!

Together with Dallas Sunrise Movement, Houston Sunrise Movement, and Houston Youth Climate Strike, we have identified 9 climate champions running in flippable state house races and are ready to mobilize our grassroots youth climate movement to elect these visionary leaders.

In the process, our goal is to boost our 2 U.S. Congressional Candidates, Our 1 Mayoral Candidate, and increase statewide Democratic turnout for one of the most important elections of our lifetime.

Join us in this historic effort to Turn Texas Blue!

---
| [DONATE TO #FLIPTEXASBLUE](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=27b1167d18&e=66979298f9 "DONATE TO #FLIPTEXASBLUE")
---

---
|
---
| Thank you,

#TeamFutureGens

He’s heading to Houston, Texas next week and he specifically requested that we reach out to YOU to accompany him. We’re nearing the end of the most important Election in American history, and the President really wants to hear your thoughts on how our campaign is doing. Patriots like you are what fuel our movement and he can’t think of anyone else who he’d rather get advice from right now. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to enter to win a trip to meet your favorite President and discuss key issues heading into November, and all you have to do is enter. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT TODAY to enter to win a trip to meet President Trump in Houston, Texas. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT One of President Trump’s favorite parts about being YOUR President is getting to spend time with American Patriots and hear their thoughts about our great Country. With only a little over a month until Election Day, your opinion is critical to helping us WIN BIG. If you win, we will cover your flight, hotel, AND you’ll get to bring a guest of your choice. You’ll even get to take a photo with the President - it’ll be a day you’ll never forget. The deadline to enter is 11:59 PM TONIGHT, so don’t wait until it’s too late. Contribute ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to win a trip to meet your favorite President in Houston, Texas. Thank you, Team Trump 2020 CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. by texting “TEXAS” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between September 30, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on October 2, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) and receive a photo opportunity with Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. As we kick off the final month of this campaign, I wanted to give you a quick update and explain why this grassroots team could be the deciding factor in what happens on Election Day.

[**But first, if you’re able, will you consider chipping in to help us start October strong so we can continue airing ads and reaching voters throughout these last five weeks?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19828227/254610557/-613620204?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.02_b1_afd_all-nd&refcode2=64732a58-bb04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDczMmE1OC1iYjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRbrzWQbS0s-MCOgNl4tOCEdWddkZtowh2n5x37NeP4=) | [Donate Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19828228/254610558/-613620204?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.02_b1_afd_all-nd&refcode2=64732a58-bb04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDczMmE1OC1iYjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRbrzWQbS0s-MCOgNl4tOCEdWddkZtowh2n5x37NeP4=)

Team, I’m proud to work for Eugene because I’ve seen what he’s done for Pennsylvanians and I know that in Congress, he will continue to be an independent leader and fight to put people ahead of partisan politics.

**But the Washington establishment and Scott Perry’s special interest backers have fought us every step of the way.** They’ve even poured _millions of dollars_ into our race to prop up Perry by airing blatantly false attack ads against Eugene.

**Friend, we don’t have big special interests swooping in to buy this election.** What we have is hard-working people like you giving [**$5, $15, $100**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19828229/254610559/-613620204?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.02_b1_afd_all-nd&refcode2=64732a58-bb04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDczMmE1OC1iYjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRbrzWQbS0s-MCOgNl4tOCEdWddkZtowh2n5x37NeP4=) at a time to help us bring real change to South Central Pennsylvania.

[**Bottom line: Our ability to win this race will be heavily shaped by this grassroots team, and your support has never been more important than it is in these final weeks. If you’re able, will you chip in any amount to help us finish strong and flip this seat blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19828230/254610560/-613620204?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.02_b1_afd_all-nd&refcode2=64732a58-bb04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDczMmE1OC1iYjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRbrzWQbS0s-MCOgNl4tOCEdWddkZtowh2n5x37NeP4=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Donate $5 Now »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19828231/254610561/-613620204?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2020.10.02_b1_afd_all-nd&refcode2=64732a58-bb04-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&amounts=15,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDczMmE1OC1iYjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jRbrzWQbS0s-MCOgNl4tOCEdWddkZtowh2n5x37NeP4=)

But the Washington establishment and Scott Perry’s special interest backers have fought us every step of the way. They’ve even poured millions of dollars into our race to prop up Perry by airing blatantly false attack ads against Eugene. Friend, we don’t have big special interests swooping in to buy this election. name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Thanks for being on our team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
Hi Peter,

You've been hearing a lot from me and my team over the past couple of weeks. It was really important for us to hit our fundraising goal before our final end-of-quarter deadline on Wednesday.

I'm happy to report that, because of your generosity, we did!

Because of the donations from folks like yourself, my re-election campaign has the momentum we need going into the home stretch of this election. So, thank you for stepping up to the plate!

My work has never been just about myself. As the daughter of immigrants and the eighth woman to give birth while serving in Congress, I've seen and experienced the struggles of working families first-hand. That's why I'm so committed to making life better for the people in my community.

Now, we have just five short weeks until Election Day. To keep representing the people of CA-38, I need the help of people like you. So, once again, thank you so much for being on my team.

Your support means the world,

-- Linda Sánchez

----------------------------------------
| Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
----------------------------------------

Stand with Sánchez
415 New Jersey Avenue, SE - Unit 1
Washington DC 20003 United States

body:

|

---
Peter,

Sen. John Cornyn has spent 18 years in Washington putting special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell ahead of working Texans. From voting 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act to dragging his feet on coronavirus relief, we can list dozens of ways Sen. Cornyn has failed the people of Texas -- but **we want to know what you think, too.**

We're putting together a focus group to hear from supporters about why you think it's important to defeat him this November, and **you 've been selected to participate!** There are just a few questions, and they won't take long to complete.

**[Click here to join the focus group now. It'll take just 5 minutes, and your input will be incredibly valuable as we work to defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate this November!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ccc/7f51f7bc/44de9c9d/4efbb750/515727951/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-focusgroupoct")**
[JOIN THE FOCUS GROUP NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ccc/7f51f7bc/44de9c9d/4efbb750/515727951/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-focusgroupoct")

Team MJ

Friend,

**_The last few weeks of the campaign are here._** Some Georgia voters have already begun casting their ballots, and we need to reach every single voter to win.

Two new polls this week have Jon Ossoff LEADING in the polls. He's got all the momentum.

_But Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies are pouring over** _$42 MILLION_** into this race to stop Jon and save their Senate majority._

We need to fight back, and we're running out of time.

**Friend, if you have been waiting to make a difference in this race, now is the time to make your first donation.** Your support will help give us the resources to mobilize voters and fight back against Mitch McConnell's machine to stay on track to win.

If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2d73/5b2c1286/34040b72/25f20c8f/11372551/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!

#
Happy Friday! Meet Josh!

Josh joined our team this summer and is on our Field staff -- he's often at the very top of the leaderboard for phone calls, you'll see him merrily traveling about our target precincts dropping literature and chatting with (socially-distanced!) voters, and if you're signed up for one of our Weekends of Action, you'll almost certainly get to meet Josh personally (lucky you!).

Josh is a real asset and you can help support the work of Josh and our whole Field team by making a donation [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d9440b58aa&e=140a9b81e7) and volunteering [here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=847642d1b7&e=140a9b81e7).

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19836652/254648543/-762162803?refcode=espy-fr-web-emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJkZjdiNS1kMzA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O2VpDNT3Je8ESIg0GZQF2OFGN7Za0et3s8MCIiHeF64=)
Jacquie here, Mike’s Outreach Director. As a lifelong Mississippian, I know how often Mississippi is overlooked and undervalued. It gives me hope to see that our race to elect Mike Espy to the U.S. Senate is finally getting the national attention it deserves. **Yesterday, it was the focus of _New York Times_ columnist Charles M. Blow’s op-ed:** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19836653/254648544/-2147440107?refcode=em-201002-nyt-ia&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJkZjdiNS1kMzA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O2VpDNT3Je8ESIg0GZQF2OFGN7Za0et3s8MCIiHeF64=)** The answer, I know for a fact, is _YES._ **In 1986, Mike became the first Black congressman elected in Mississippi since the Reconstruction era, and after generations of disenfranchisement of Black Mississippians.** When the Civil War ended in 1865, Mississippi was a majority Black state. As Mr. Blow writes in the _New York Times_ , “Perhaps no state at the time held the promise of true Black electoral power more than Mississippi.” During Reconstruction, Mississippi’s majority Black population had real representation in government. One fourth of the state legislature was Black, and the delegation displayed its power when they succeeded in appointing the first Black senator in American history. Senator Hiram Revels was called, “The 15th Amendment in flesh and blood.” But in response to growing Black political power, a group of politicians in Mississippi effectively ended Reconstruction. They codified the disenfranchisement of Black Mississippians. They brought forth Black Codes, Jim Crow, and years of rampant voter suppression, fraud, and violence. The Mississippi State House wouldn’t see another Black representative until 1968, **and Mississippi didn’t elect another Black representative to Congress until 1986 (Mike Espy).** Mike was then re-elected three times before becoming the first Black U.S. Secretary of Agriculture. For too long, Mississippi has been held back in health care, in jobs, and in education. Too often, we are disrespected, wrongly overlooked, and counted out in elections. Sometimes it feels like people are even afraid to say the word _“Mississippi."_ I mean, just a few weeks ago, when a hurricane was moving toward us, our state was simply referred to as a “landmass.” Like Fannie Lou Hamer once said, we’re “sick and tired of being sick and tired.” **But we’re changing the narrative with our campaign.** We’re building a broad coalition of support all across the state, prioritizing the issues that matter most, and getting out in the communities to hear directly from the people. And now we’re just _one point _behind our far-right opponent, something the pundits never would have predicted at the start of our campaign.** ** Like Charles M. Blow said, _“We are in the homestretch, but Espy has a real chance.”_

[**We just can’t do it alone, really. With only 32 days left until Election Day, will you stand with Mike Espy and help send him to the U.S. Senate by pitching in $10 or more today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19836654/254648545/-2147440107?refcode=em-201002-nyt-ia&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJkZjdiNS1kMzA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O2VpDNT3Je8ESIg0GZQF2OFGN7Za0et3s8MCIiHeF64=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19836655/254648546/-2147440107?refcode=em-201002-nyt-ia&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzJkZjdiNS1kMzA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O2VpDNT3Je8ESIg0GZQF2OFGN7Za0et3s8MCIiHeF64=)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Would you shut up?"
body:
My opponent—far-left Democrat Rep. Lois Frankel—just got the endorsement of radical anti-gun thug group, Everytown for Gun Safety.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395566-931844-5221588-690ab6526d-f853948134)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395566-931844-5221588-690ab6526d-f853948134) **“Would you shut up?”**

That’s what Joe Biden told the President of the United States during Tuesday’s debate.

But Joe Biden’s not alone. In fact, **the far-left is engaged in an all-out push to silence conservatives**.

I’ve lived it: I’ve been banned from Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, you name it... just because I dared to be a vocal and opinionated conservative.

I’m not the only one... and **if conservatives don’t start fighting back, you could be next** ...

...completely silenced, just because you support free speech, the Second Amendment, the right to life, and the President of the United States.

**I’m running for Congress because no one punches back like I do.**

When I make it to Washington, I will change the rules of the game... and win the fight for our rights as conservatives and as Americans.

[**But I need you to come through right away with an emergency gift of $10 to make that happen.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395566-931844-5221588-690ab6526d-f853948134)

[**Will you pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 right away to help me win?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-395566-931844-5221588-690ab6526d-f853948134)

Thanks,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

Derek,

If you can see above, folks from around the Commonwealth have pitched in to re-elect Mark Warner, flip the Senate, and keep Virginia blue.

But there's something missing, Derek. **And it 's your name.**

There are just 32 days until Election Day on November 3rd, and we need to work harder than ever. Remember -- in 2014, Mark won by _less than 1%._ **[Can you make your first online gift today to protect the progress we've made in our Commonwealth?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da66/53d9897e/55b8b3be/1c88e7bf/3237298466/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-donorrollnd?refcode=20201002_f_1_nd__792__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

name: Team Spanberger
subject: Join us for our Climate Town Hall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/cO0K1QaxJPdWtJknII6NUPiT-3k3lkn5juz2tPlUlrU=/IG9-y_epqF3Nev-bP-JMtO1gyeNpGPzMd8qisdF8o6w=?refcode=climatetownhall)
---
| Peter, Please join us next **Wednesday, October 7th at 2:00 PM** for a virtual town hall on climate change, conservation, and the environment! **Representative Spanberger will be joined by featured guest Todd Stern,** who served as the United States Special Envoy for Climate Change under President Obama and served as the United States' chief negotiator for the 2015 Paris Climate Agreement. _**[Sign up here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/cO0K1QaxJPdWtJknII6NUPiT-3k3lkn5juz2tPlUlrU=/gECcOi5Bb6a24nHwmR9NtTD6xrJDuhmYmxx4PeYAsPc=)**_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/cO0K1QaxJPdWtJknII6NUPiT-3k3lkn5juz2tPlUlrU=/7q8Wh1qhRlWgLRhW_JipTTQoPEvoitOxBY7CZI9syTI=) This event is co-hosted by several of our environmental partners: **National Wildlife Action Fund Political Committee, EDF Action PAC, Sierra Club Political Committee, NRDC Action Fund PAC, and LCV Action Fund.** The event will be streamed live from Abigail's campaign social media pages, and a direct link will be provided after registration. This interactive event will include time for questions from the audience. We hope you will be able to join us on Wednesday for this important conversation!
---
| [SIGN UP HERE](https://act.myngp.com/el/cO0K1QaxJPdWtJknII6NUPiT-3k3lkn5juz2tPlUlrU=/gECcOi5Bb6a24nHwmR9NtTD6xrJDuhmYmxx4PeYAsPc=)

| Dear Friend,

Pat Hackett is proud to have earned the endorsement of Indivisible, a grassroots movement with thousands of volunteers across the country working together to elect progressive leaders, rebuild our democracy, and defeat the forces undermining our democracy.

“These national endorsements are key to elevating a new class of leaders who are preferred by the grassroots and whose values reflect those of our movement.”

[**We are pleased Indivisible has recognized the strength and momentum of this campaign and its commitment to We the People.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=93f3b674f4&e=5886ca081d) Pat will advocate for the people in her district by pursuing healthcare for all, just wages and worker's rights, education reform, responsible environmental and gun laws, and more.

name: Bill Olson
subject: Confirm the SCOTUS Justice!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I am thrilled with President Trumps' choosing Amy Coney Barrett for the Supreme Court, and I will fight the racist attacks being made against Judge Barrett!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

I have always said there is a disturbing racism about the thinking of the extreme Left- that their constant focus on the supposed "racism" of others is an act to distract from their own disgusting bigotry.

This week, I was proven sadly right.

I would have thought Pelosi and the far Left would have learned their lesson after their defeat in the Kavanaugh fiasco. Apparently not.

Liberals on social media are questioning whether two children adopted by President Trump’s expected Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, were adopted legitimately — as Senate Republicans leaped to defend her.

“Some adoptions from Haiti were legit. Many were sketchy as hell,” wrote a Democratic activist and former Capitol Hill staffer, Dana Houle, in a since-deleted tweet on Friday.

“Would it matter if her kids were scooped up by ultra-religious Americans, or ... when there was family in Haiti?”

Another left-wing activist, John Lee Brougher of the NextGen America PAC, added fuel to the fire.

“As an adoptee, I need to know more about the circumstances of how Amy Coney Barrett came to adopt her children, and the treatment of them since,” Brougher wrote, according to Breitbart News. “Transracial adoption is fraught with trauma and potential for harm.” Brougher’s tweet has also been removed.

These racist cowards didn't even have the guts to stand behind their woke racism. Others on the extreme Left, however, DID stand by their racist attacks- and are paid by major universities to do so.

Ibram X. Kendi, an American author who became the new director of the Center for Antiracist Research at Boston University in July, railed against Barrett on Twitter for adopting two Black children from Haiti, equating her and her husband to “White colonizers.”

“Some White colonizers ‘adopted’ Black children. They ‘civilized’ these ‘savage’ children in the ‘superior’ ways of White people, while using them as props in their lifelong pictures of denial, while cutting the biological parents of these children out of the picture of humanity,” Kendi wrote Saturday.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

I thought we were beyond this as a country, but maybe not.

The Left that commands Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have been murdering people, burning cities, and engaging in personal targeting (they call it "cancelling") for years.

This is good enough reason not to vote for any Democrat, on any level, this year. They won't condemn the disgusting treason and violence in their own ranks- including the racist attacks on Judge Barrett's family!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

How could you see a picture of the Barrett family and hate those children? Imagine how full of hate- extremist, ideological hate- you would have to be.

I am not full of hate, and I bet you aren't either. I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

If we want to stop Leftist racism, we must stand together NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations.

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fugiftvmlF6OuRU&b=DwSUG7Z9b2BA3HlkBeV5bA

Bill Olson

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just won big in my primary! I am thrilled with President Trumps' choosing Amy Coney Barrett for the Supreme Court, and I will fight the racist attacks being made against Judge Barrett! I have always said there is a disturbing racism about the thinking of the extreme Left- that their constant focus on the supposed "racism" of others is an act to distract from their own disgusting bigotry. This week, I was proven sadly right. I would have thought Pelosi and the far Left would have learned their lesson after their defeat in the Kavanaugh fiasco. Apparently not. Liberals on social media are questioning whether two children adopted by President Trump’s expected Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, were adopted legitimately — as Senate Republicans leaped to defend her. “Some adoptions from Haiti were legit. Many were sketchy as hell,” wrote a Democratic activist and former Capitol Hill staffer, Dana Houle, in a since-deleted tweet on Friday. “Would it matter if her kids were scooped up by ultra-religious Americans, or ... when there was family in Haiti?” Another left-wing activist, John Lee Brougher of the NextGen America PAC, added fuel to the fire. “As an adoptee, I need to know more about the circumstances of how Amy Coney Barrett came to adopt her children, and the treatment of them since,” Brougher wrote, according to Breitbart News. “Transracial adoption is fraught with trauma and potential for harm.” Brougher’s tweet has also been removed. These racist cowards didn't even have the guts to stand behind their woke racism. Others on the extreme Left, however, DID stand by their racist attacks- and are paid by major universities to do so. Ibram X. Kendi, an American author who became the new director of the Center for Antiracist Research at Boston University in July, railed against Barrett on Twitter for adopting two Black children from Haiti, equating her and her husband to “White colonizers.” “Some White colonizers ‘adopted’ Black children. They ‘civilized’ these ‘savage’ children in the ‘superior’ ways of White people, while using them as props in their lifelong pictures of denial, while cutting the biological parents of these children out of the picture of humanity,” Kendi wrote Saturday. Image I thought we were beyond this as a country, but maybe not. The Left that commands Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats have been murdering people, burning cities, and engaging in personal targeting (they call it "cancelling") for years. This is good enough reason not to vote for any Democrat, on any level, this year. They won't condemn the disgusting treason and violence in their own ranks- including the racist attacks on Judge Barrett's family! Image How could you see a picture of the Barrett family and hate those children? Imagine how full of hate- extremist, ideological hate- you would have to be. I am not full of hate, and I bet you aren't either. I am a patriot and I need your help to beat the far Left! If we want to stop Leftist racism, we must stand together NOW! The Democrats can only pack the Supreme Court if they hold the House. If Republicans take Congress from Nancy Pelosi's Democrats, it's all over for their unconstitutional aspirations. If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now! I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST the far Left! Can you help me? This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. (757) 524-2701 wyatt@scotttaylor2020.com | | | == | | | | | | ---|--- | What's the best way to get involved this week? GO VOTE. Cast your vote- early and in-person! Show your ID at your local voter registrar office and vote the entire November ballot now! Ensure that your vote is counted & that you miss the hectic lines of Election Day. Find your local information, like hours and location, visit: | | | == | | == | | | == | | == | Questions? Simply reply to this email or call us directly at (757) 366-1072. | Important Dates | | | == ---|--- | SAVE THE DATE! General Election November 3rd 2020 only 32 days away! Why wait until November? Ensure your vote is counted now! Show an ID and vote in-person when you == EARLY! Details ==. name: Jay Inslee
subject: RSVP to join Secretary Hillary Clinton and me on Zoom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We'll talk about how we're still stronger together.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9) Friend, Secretary Hillary Clinton knew better than anyone the dangers of a Trump presidency. Now, those dangers have become our reality. She warned us about each and every moment we've faced as a nation, and there's no one who I'd rather talk with about how we heal our country and rebuild our national trust. **That's why I'm excited to talk about all that and more with her on Thursday, October 8th, at 5:00 p.m. PT / 8:00 p.m. ET. Can you join us?[Donate $15, or whatever feels right to you, and you can RSVP to join former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton and me to talk about our country and how we are still stronger together.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12136?t=4&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$15 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12228?t=5&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)
---
| | [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12139?t=6&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)
---
| [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12140?t=7&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)
---
| | [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12141?t=8&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)
---
| [$250 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12229?t=9&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12136?t=10&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)
---
It'll be truly inspiring and -- I hope -- a bit healing, too.
As we focus on what is at stake in these last 32 days, I hope you can join us.
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12136?t=11&akid=8173%2E868730%2ECwzWA9)

name: [URGENT] - via Team Ossoff
subject: BREAKING: Amy Coney Barrett called for ending Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
She called it "barbaric," friend! |
---
Friend, we knew one of the reasons Donald Trump nominated Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court was to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

**But the fact that she signed a letter in support of ending _Roe v. Wade_ , calling it "barbaric," is even more evidence of what she will do if confirmed.** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2d2d/5b2c1286/340ddca9/25f20832/1116423775/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_10_02_acb_barrvw?refcode=em_2020_10_02_acb_barrvw") | | [CHIP IN TO WIN THE SENATE](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2d2d/5b2c1286/340ddca9/25f20832/1116423775/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_10_02_acb_barrvw?refcode=em_2020_10_02_acb_barrvw")
---

This is why Jon Ossoff's opponent, Senator David Perdue, endorsed her within minutes of her nomination.

**When Perdue met with Barrett this week, did he ask her any tough questions? Did he ask her if she will impartially uphold the rule of law in _Roe v. Wade_ and defend the fundamental right to privacy in health care?**

**_Does he even care?_**

**Perdue needs to take his role seriously and not just be a blind vote for someone who could endanger his constituents.**

We can _and we will_ stop David Perdue and Amy Coney Barrett from allowing the government to infringe on women's autonomy over their own bodies.

**Jon Ossoff, who is LEADING Perdue in the polls, will only vote to confirm federal judges who pledge to uphold _Roe v. Wade_.** Jon runs a business that has investigated and exposed how dangerous, unqualified, and unregulated abortion providers kill thousands of women in places where safe abortion services are not available legally.

**[Chip in any amount right now to make sure Jon wins in Georgia and Democrats take control of the Senate, so they can protect the privacy of women's health care.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2d2d/5b2c1286/340ddca9/25f20832/1116423775/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_10_02_acb_barrvw?refcode=em_2020_10_02_acb_barrvw")**

body:
**BREAKING: Pelosi sets aside THOU$AND$

| In 2011, Kat's family lost everything. Due to a failed Obama-era program, her family lost their small cattle ranch, leaving them homeless. After living through the negative effects of big government, Kat decided it was enough.
No family should have to go through having their dreams destroyed due to senseless policies, so Kat decided to do something about it.
Kat is now a successful small business owner who fought to make a better life for herself and her family. Even after losing everything, she picked herself back up, determined to fulfill her American Dream, and she succeeded. Now, she is fighting for YOUR American Dream!
We need a strong conservative leader like Kat to ensure our families and communities are a priority. Florida does not need big government - they need a healthy economy and secure borders. Kat will fight to rebuild our economy stronger than ever, take down the squad, and keep America great!

Peter,
_**This election is about Big Choices.**_ Do we stand for government monopolized healthcare and providing salaries for those who choose not to work like my opponent, Ben Ray Lujan? or do we stand for protecting pre-existing conditions, supporting small businesses, and rewarding hard work, like I do.

Dr. Joseph Ladapo is one of the doctors we’ve been working with through the Second Opinion Project. This week, he released a new report that is a must-read. It’s titled, [“Randomized Controlled Trials of Early Ambulatory Hydroxychloroquine in the Prevention of COVID-19 Infection, Hospitalization, and Death: Meta-Analysis.”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc2LTBmYTE2ZWIzOTA2ZjQ2MTc4MTk0YzVhM2NlZDIwMmZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWVkcnhpdi5vcmcvY29udGVudC8xMC4xMTAxLzIwMjAuMDkuMzAuMjAyMDQ2OTN2MT9taWQ9NDI3NDUmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=f8QKs4EM2gu5sCzVESnDkg) A summary of the results and conclusion state:
_“Five randomized controlled clinical trials enrolling 5,577 patients were included. HCQ was associated with a 24% reduction in COVID-19 infection, hospitalization or death, P=.025 (RR, 0.76 [95% CI, 0.59 to 0.97]). No serious adverse cardiac events were reported. The most common side effects were gastrointestinal. Conclusion--Hydroxychloroquine use in outpatients reduces the incidence of the composite outcome of COVID-19 infection, hospitalization, and death. Serious adverse events were not reported and cardiac arrhythmia was rare.”_
It is past time to end the politicization of all potential COVID treatments. How many Americans must suffer or die before the President’s political opponents put America first, ahead of their political ambitions?
|

Saturday, President Trump made history, yet again, when he introduced the country to his 3rd Supreme Court nominee, Judge Amy Coney Barrett.

Following the passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, there was intense debate on whether the vacancy should be filled before or after the 2020 election.

However, Presidents are not elected for 3 years and 6 months, they are elected for 4 years. So, President Trump, well within his power, moved forward with the nomination process. Not only that, but history and precedent demonstrate that when the White House and the Senate are controlled by the same party, the nominee has been confirmed during a presidential election year in every instance but one (when there were serious questions about the nominee’s judicial ethics).

We applaud the President’s quick and decisive action and look forward to a swift Senate confirmation of Judge Barrett.

If you support the confirmation of Judge Barrett, [please consider signing our petition](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjc2LTBmYTE2ZWIzOTA2ZjQ2MTc4MTk0YzVhM2NlZDIwMmZj%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25maXJtc2NvdHVzLmFjdC50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQyNzQ1JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=w03sYIc7n48SErpDJhRP_Q).

They immediately responded with a bevy of threats; one of the worst being their threat to pack the Supreme Court.

Following such an outrageous threat, the Presidential candidates were asked where they stood on court packing.

The Trump Administration came out strongly against the proposal, correctly calling it a danger to our republic. But, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris had nothing to say on the matter...

Why? Because the truth is, like many in the Democratic Party, Biden and Harris secretly support court packing -- seeing it as an opportunity to pack the court with liberal justices who will completely destroy our law and Constitution as we know it. And action that was too radical for FDR is not too extreme for Biden and Harris.

After months of waiting, the first presidential debate finally took place this week between President Trump and former Vice President Biden.

The Supreme Court, taxes, healthcare and much more were up for discussion in the first round of the candidates going head to head. And the debate went exactly how we expected it to go...

President Trump out-smarted and out-debated Joe Biden at every turn, despite Biden’s best attempts to outwit the President. Biden was even clearly aggravated at certain points, refusing to refute valid counterpoints brought up by the President. At one point, Biden even told the President to “shut up.”

Without question, President Trump won the first debate.

Ted Cruz of Texas until Cruz challenged the treatment he was getting. | Dr. Joseph Ladapo is one of the doctors we’ve been working with through the Second Opinion Project. This week, he released a new report that is a must-read. It’s titled, A summary of the results and conclusion state: “Five randomized controlled clinical trials enrolling 5,577 patients were included. HCQ was associated with a 24% reduction in COVID-19 infection, hospitalization or death, P=.025 (RR, 0.76 [95% CI, 0.59 to 0.97]). No serious adverse cardiac events were reported. The most common side effects were gastrointestinal. Conclusion--Hydroxychloroquine use in outpatients reduces the incidence of the composite outcome of COVID-19 infection, hospitalization, and death. Serious adverse events were not reported and cardiac arrhythmia was rare.” It is past time to end the politicization of all potential COVID treatments. However, Presidents are not elected for 3 years and 6 months, they are elected for 4 years. So, President Trump, well within his power, moved forward with the nomination process. Not only that, but history and precedent demonstrate that when the White House and the Senate are controlled by the same party, the nominee has been confirmed during a presidential election year in every instance but one (when there were serious questions about the nominee’s judicial ethics). body:
We cannot let our democracy be compromised
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19845854/254685231/-359963674?refcode=em_fr_2020.10.2_b1_sfc_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDAxNjdiNS1mNjA0LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTjbJqoSTHTfNHf1eHs8G107PS5KNwPR0zcB7ZOw458=)
---
|
Friend,
Tomorrow is October 3rd, **which means that Election Day will be exactly one month away.**

We can't stress to you enough the urgency of this election. Yesterday, Gov. Abbott signed a proclamation closing ballot drop off boxes across our state -- making it even harder for people with disabilities and the elderly to vote. Just a few days ago, President Trump refused to condemn white supremacists supporting his re-election.

As Sri said just yesterday: **We cannot let our democracy be compromised.**

**And all the while, families are struggling with the burdens of health care costs and an economy crippled by the job losses stemming from this pandemic.**

They (and I hope you,) will be making one of the most impactful decisions that will carry our nation through the next four years. I think the choice is pretty clear: ❌ Anarchy, violence, one size fits all single payer health care, Green New Deal

✅ Freedom, liberty, protected borders, low taxes, protected constitutional rights Peter, I want to ask you a very simple question: Can I count on your commitment to get out and vote on this November 3rd? I need you to respond now by adding your name: [**YES! | Friends, Let's talk about which NH Senate candidates are offering real choice in education reform and improvement here in New Hampshire. Over the past few years, Governor Sununu and the New Hampshire Republicans have led the way on true education reform in our state. Republicans have fought to give parents more control over where their children go to school - after all, it is the parent who best knows how a child learns. Additionally, NH Republicans have championed student safety. Thanks to the efforts of Senate Republicans this past session, the state passed new laws protecting our students from inappropriate student-teacher relationships. Meanwhile, NH Democrats have done everything that they can to prevent our schools from improving. Just this past month, the four opponents of these Republican candidates once again blocked the state from accepting a $46 million federal grant for charter schools which enhances school choice for parents. They fear educational choice and opportunity will loosen the influence of their political allies. Remember, when it comes to education, Republicans want what is best for parents and students. Republicans understand that students need an opportunity to thrive not a one size fits all approach to learning. Below find our list of the top Republican champions for New Hampshire education reform:

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update: Register, Vote, Serve, Report
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=259A550A20A2510)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK
---
| | This week put many things into perspective as we learned the news of our president testing positive for COVID-19. Please join us as we stand together in prayer for President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump as they enter into their quarantine and recovery process.

In the first presidential debate on Tuesday, President Trump pointed out that universal mail-in voting presents opportunities for massive voter fraud and disenfranchisement. Immediately, the liberal media attacked these warnings against vote by mail and continued to push it's false narrative that election fraud is not real as a means to promote the left's orchestrated assault on Americans' voting rights. The reality is, evidence of discarded ballots, illegal voting, vote harvesting, and election fraud are piling up across the country as states continue to push widespread vote by mail.

Just in the last few days...

* The [Anne Arundel County, Maryland, Board of Elections](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbSUyRjIwMjAtZWxlY3Rpb24lMkYyMDIwJTJGMTAlMkYwMiUyRmFubmUtYXJ1bmRlbC1jb3VudHktZWxlY3Rpb24tb2ZmaWNpYWxzLXdhcm4tb2YtYmFsbG90LWNvbGxlY3Rpbmctc2NhbSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=259A550A20A2531) warned of a scam involving an individual or group “unlawfully going door-to-door” to collect completed ballots.
* The U.S. Postal Service found 1,200 missing absentee ballots from west-central [Missouri’s Pettis County](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubWlzc291cmluZXQuY29tJTJGMjAyMCUyRjEwJTJGMDIlMkZ1cGRhdGUtbWlzc2luZy1ydXJhbC1taXNzb3VyaS1hYnNlbnRlZS1iYWxsb3RzLWxvY2F0ZWQtYXQtc3QtbG91aXMtdXNwcy1mYWNpbGl0eSUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=259A550A20A2532) at its St. Louis processing and distribution center.
* A Colorado Congressman sent a letter to the Department of Justice and the Federal Election Commission, asking them to investigate the [Colorado](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20lMkZwb2xpdGljcyUyRnJlcC1rZW4tYnVjay1hY2N1c2VzLWNvbG9yYWRvLXNlY3JldGFyeS1vZi1zdGF0ZS1vZi1zZW5kaW5nLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1wb3N0Y2FyZHMtdG8tbm9uLWNpdGl6ZW5zLWRlYWQtcGVvcGxlLWluLWxldHRlci10by1kb2o=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=259A550A20A2533)[ Secretary of State](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20lMkZwb2xpdGljcyUyRnJlcC1rZW4tYnVjay1hY2N1c2VzLWNvbG9yYWRvLXNlY3JldGFyeS1vZi1zdGF0ZS1vZi1zZW5kaW5nLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1wb3N0Y2FyZHMtdG8tbm9uLWNpdGl6ZW5zLWRlYWQtcGVvcGxlLWluLWxldHRlci10by1kb2o=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=259A550A20A2533)'s efforts to send out voter registration cards to non-citizens and dead people.
* [100,000 Brooklyn voters](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cubnl0aW1lcy5jb20lMkYyMDIwJTJGMTAlMkYwMSUyRm55cmVnaW9uJTJGYnJvb2tseW4tYWJzZW50ZWUtYmFsbG90Lmh0bWwlM0ZzbWlkJTNEdHctc2hhcmU=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=259A550A20A2534) received faulty absentee ballots, and the New York Times reported the "confused voters said they now distrusted the process."

Our podcast this week exposes the engineered chaos around the entire election process - not just mail in voting - and highlights the actions Americans can take to help ensure a safe and secure election.

1. [Register.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=av9PoT7lBg2F0e2Bks1Q4twqvEisCftfrxSNfMSAxd0%3D&s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=258A540A21A2498) Check your voter registration. Make sure it's active and accurate.
2. [Vote.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=av9PoT7lBg2F0e2Bks1Q4twqvEisCftfrxSNfMSAxd0%3D&s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=258A540A21A2498) Make a plan to vote in person, if you can.
3. [Serve.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=av9PoT7lBg2F0e2Bks1Q4twqvEisCftfrxSNfMSAxd0%3D&s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=258A540A21A2508) Call your County and your Party and tell them you want to work in your local elections.
4. [Report.](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=av9PoT7lBg2F0e2Bks1Q4twqvEisCftfrxSNfMSAxd0%3D&s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=258A540A21A2509) If you've witnessed election fraud, share your story with us on our website.

Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht

| | IN THE NEWS
---
| | | |
---
| | TRUE THE VOTE ENCOURAGES AMERICAN VOTERS TO TAKE ACTION
As the left continues its orchestrated assault on our election process and voters' rights, True the Vote is encouraging Americans to take action to help ensure a safe and secure election this November.
---
| | [ LEARN MORE
](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ3d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20lMkZ3YXRjaCUzRnYlM0Rwa1dKdUYzOUpjQQ==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=259A550A20A2535)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | VIDEO: THE MOST IMPORTANT ELECTION OF OUR LIFETIMES
True the Vote's video highlights what is at stake this election if voters do not step up and get engaged in the election process. It specifically dives into what the left has been doing to push states towards expanded mail voting and universal vote by mail.

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK | | This week put many things into perspective as we learned the news of our president testing positive for COVID-19. Please join us as we stand together in prayer for President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump as they enter into their quarantine and recovery process. In the first presidential debate on Tuesday, President Trump pointed out that universal mail-in voting presents opportunities for massive voter fraud and disenfranchisement. Immediately, the liberal media attacked these warnings against vote by mail and continued to push it's false narrative that election fraud is not real as a means to promote the left's orchestrated assault on Americans' voting rights. The reality is, evidence of discarded ballots, illegal voting, vote harvesting, and election fraud are piling up across the country as states continue to push widespread vote by mail. Just in the last few days... The warned of a scam involving an individual or group “unlawfully going door-to-door” to collect completed ballots. The U.S. Postal Service found 1,200 missing absentee ballots from west-central at its St. Louis processing and distribution center. A Colorado Congressman sent a letter to the Department of Justice and the Federal Election Commission, asking them to investigate the efforts to send out voter registration cards to non-citizens and dead people. received faulty absentee ballots, and the New York Times reported the "confused voters said they now distrusted the process." Our podcast this week exposes the engineered chaos around the entire election process - not just mail in voting - and highlights the actions Americans can take to help ensure a safe and secure election. 1. Check your voter registration. Make sure it's active and accurate. 2. Make a plan to vote in person, if you can. 3. Call your County and your Party and tell them you want to work in your local elections. 4. If you've witnessed election fraud, share your story with us on our website. Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht | | | | | OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED WHITE & TRUE: | | | | | | | NEW EPISODE: EP. 20 | Brace for Impact! name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: BIG endorsements, SCOTUS, upcoming events, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Veteran. Businessman. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/216b69e5b355a59fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/8d78af6a169a2289c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Governor Sununu Endorses Corky’s U.S. Senate Run in New TV Ad**

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/8a9ccea4ae8d8051c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Governor Chris Sununu endorses fellow Republican Corky Messner’s U.S. Senate run against Democrat Jeanne Shaheen in a **[new television ad](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/ca16521f8c62728fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

The **[30-second spot](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/43a541d65b65e42bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** features Governor Sununu and Corky standing side by side, with the Governor talking about Messner’s military background and his business success.

“Corky’s one of us,” says Sununu. “He loves New Hampshire and he won’t put our health care at risk. With Corky, it’s never about big government or politics. It’s just about putting people first. We need him in the U.S. Senate.” Corky adds: “I’ll make sure New Hampshire has the resources to grow our economy, I’ll fight for the 603 in Washington."

The ad, which represents a six-figure spend, airs statewide on cable, broadcast and digital outlets.
|
---
**Corky Joins Forces with Former UN Ambassador Nikki Haley**
Corky spent time this past week with Nikki Haley, former U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations, a strong conservative advocate and a steadfast ally of President Trump.

Speaking with several of Corky’s supporters Thursday, Ambassador Haley pointed out that U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen “doesn’t fit” with New Hampshire’s conservative values.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/1027e05d22d7ba2ac3d6b838967d376c/33153)
“Pre-COVID, our economy was breaking every record, and with a Republican Senate, we did it once, we can do it again,” she explained. Senator Shaheen “is not with us on foreign policy, she opposes Judge Barrett for the Supreme Court,” and her positions are not in our best interests.

She also applauded Corky’s commitment to only serve two terms. “We’ve got people who have been in Washington way too long.”

Check out **[this video of support](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/b01b6a18d01a0efdc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** , as Ambassador Haley urges Granite Staters to support Corky’s run for U.S. Senate and **[her remarks to Fox News](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/37c4e916d48d7b67c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** during her visit to New Hampshire.
|
---
**In The News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/4e7a2bbeffec5b75c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky started the week with **[another chat](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/159bac2cff3f76e4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** with Jack Heath of New Hampshire Today. The topics included the Supreme Court pick, and Corky’s view that Senator Shaheen should meet with Amy Coney Barrett to learn more about her views, rather than follow the lead of Democrat party leaders in attacking the nominee based solely on their political bias. He also discussed healthcare options and Senator Shaheen’s misrepresentation of existing protections for those with pre-existing conditions.
|
---
**President Trump’s SCOTUS Nominee Respects the Constitution and the Rule of Law, Says Corky**
Corky applauds the choice of Amy Coney Barrett as the President’s nominee to the Supreme Court.
“As a Constitutional conservative who believes the Court’s role is to interpret the Constitution as written, I applaud President Trump’s choice of Judge Amy Coney Barrett as his Supreme Court nominee. I urge Senator Jeanne Shaheen and other Senate Democrats to put politics aside and join Republicans in conducting a nomination hearing with dignity, decorum and civility. A fair and impartial hearing will no doubt lead the Senate and the American people to conclude that Judge Barrett is worthy of a seat on our highest court.”

|
---
**Corky is Endorsed by New England Police Benevolent Association**
Corky Messner has been endorsed by the largest, all exclusive law enforcement labor union in New England, which cites his “pro-police stance.” The New England Police Benevolent Association, also the largest law enforcement labor union in the state of New Hampshire, is supporting his run to unseat Democrat Jeanne Shaheen.
“I am honored to receive this endorsement, and I join all Granite Staters in supporting and defending our police,” says Corky. “Those in uniform keep our cities and towns safe, while putting their lives on the line every day. Their service, bravery, and dedication are truly remarkable, especially given recent efforts to denigrate this honorable profession.”

“On behalf of the New England PBA, it is our distinct pleasure and honor to support your candidacy for U.S. Senate,” reads the letter to Messner from the organization’s Executive Director Jerry Flynn, President Chris Ryan, and N.H. State Director/Legislative Director Stephen Arnold, Sr. “As you are well aware, hardworking and dedicated police officers across this great country are targets of assassination, vilified by the media, ridiculed by athletes and pundits, ostracized by the general public because of the false narrative glorified by the far left of the Democratic Party.”

They continue: “In fact, your Democratic opponent in this race, Senator Jeanne Shaheen, has taken a different approach to advocate against decent, dedicated and hardworking police officers in an attempt to feed that same false narrative as Senator Chuck Schumer and the far left of the Democratic Party. Yet, she apparently has forgotten about Manchester Police Officer Michael Briggs, who was shot and killed in the line of duty, as he patrolled and protected the streets and the business interests of the people of New Hampshire.

“As a result of your unrelenting and pro-police stance regarding our membership and our brethren in the Granite State, we wholeheartedly support your candidacy for U.S. Senate in the State of New Hampshire.”
|
---
**Is Senator Shaheen for Packing SCOTUS?**
She soon will be packing, of course, but in this case, we’re referring to our Senator’s views on her party’s plans to expand or “pack” the Supreme Court.
In light of former Vice President Joe Biden and Senator Kamala Harris’ repeated refusals to answer questions about whether or not they would support adding additional justices, Corky called upon Senator Jeanne Shaheen to disavow efforts by the radical left to pack the court.

According to Corky, “Expanding the court by placing partisan allies on the bench to achieve political leverage would subvert the Supreme Court's role as an impartial arbiter of the rule of law. It would ensure that the radical, progressive left gains total control, denying millions of Americans their ability to be truly represented by the government that is intended to serve them. If Senator Shaheen is the bipartisan champion she claims to be, she should have no problem disavowing efforts to pack the court.”
|
---
**Where's Corky? Everywhere!**
Corky continues to meet with Granite Staters and hear their concerns, and his schedule is back-to-back as we head to the general election Nov. 3. We recently took part in several wonderful events with enthusiastic crowds, as we hit the road with a message that we need change in Washington. It’s time to retire career politician Jeanne Shaheen!
**UPCOMING EVENTS**

**Saturday, October 3 from 1-3pm**
Apple Picking Party hosted by Lou Gargiulo
21 Linden Rd, Hampton Falls, NH 03844-2035, United States
RSVP REQUIRED – **[click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/bee360501e8cf78d/61031b182eb2d02ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**

body:
While President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump are now safely quarantining at the White House after a positive COVID-19 diagnoses, Hoosiers are | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/were-doing-this-together-469790?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Praying for a Safe Recovery_** While **President Trump** and **First Lady Melania Trump** are now safely quarantining at the White House after positive COVID-19 diagnoses, Hoosiers are coming together. We're praying for the health and recovery of the First Family, and the health of all with COVID-19.

This disease has again proven that no one is immune, and it’s another reminder to focus on good hygiene, social distancing and wearing masks.

We’re now just over 30 days away from Election Day, with early voting in person beginning this Tuesday. Indiana’s economy is bouncing back with an unemployment rate that keeps dropping (now 6.4%), and health benchmarks showing that Indiana is making progress. **Governor Holcomb** shared this week that Indiana's COVID-19 positivity rate is continuing to stay around 4%, while more schools and employers are opening for business.

Republican leadership delivers results. Starting on Tuesday, make your voice heard that you want to see this progress continue.

Go out and cast your vote for our entire Republican team!

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

_**PHOTO:** This week, **Chairman Hupfer** presented the keynote remarks at the La Porte County Reagan Day Dinner. He talked about Indiana’s Republican leadership, with **Governor Holcomb** and our Republican legislators making sure Indiana was ready to handle the impacts of COVID-19 – with record job creation, record high wages, low taxes, balanced budgets and a responsible rainy day fund. That same leadership is now working to take Indiana to even greater heights._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Pro-Life Leadership_** Yesterday, **Governor Holcomb** announced some huge news! Thanks to his pro-life leadership, Indiana's infant mortality rate just fell to the lowest level ever recorded in our state’s history.

**Gov. Holcomb** has taken direct and impactful action to protect our state's most vulnerable citizens, including:
* Implementing Levels of Care certification for perinatal programs at hospitals and birthing centers to ensure that mothers and babies get care at a facility with a level of care that matches their risk.
* Expanding the Nurse-Family Partnership Program to combat infant mortality rates.
* Starting Indiana's OB Navigator program that connects pregnant women in Indiana's highest-risk ZIP codes with wraparound health services.

There's still work to do on this front, but this news is wonderful for our state. It's just the latest pro-life success story from **Governor Holcomb** , and that's not to mention the big news just weeks ago that Indiana leads the nation in adoptions out of foster care! To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8de468cb27&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9e30d8f525&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2ada6cc31c&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ddd296ed0f&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**Get Well Soon, Mr. President!**_
This morning, we learned tha**t President Donald Trump** and **First Lady Melania Trump** have tested positive for COVID-19. We know that they’re fighters, and as Hoosiers, we’re all praying for their speedy recovery -- and for the health of all diagnosed!
---
| |
---
|
---
| _**Todd Rokita Earns Right to Life Endorsement!**_
Indiana Right to Life PAC today announced its endorsement of **Todd Rokita** for Attorney General!**Todd Rokita** is a lifetime advocate for the unborn, earning a 100% pro-life voting record as a member of Congress. In addition, **Todd Rokita** was endorsed by Indiana Right to Life during his two terms as Secretary of State.

_“**Todd Rokita** is the pro-life choice for attorney general,” states Indiana Right to Life PAC chairman Mike Fichter. “We have absolute certainty that he will strongly defend Indiana’s pro-life laws in the courts, including future laws as well as those laws already being challenged in the federal courts.”_
---
|
---
|
---
---
| _**Let’s Support Hoosier Amy Coney Barrett!**_ Last weekend, President Trump nominated a fellow Hoosier, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, an excellent Constitutional conservative, to serve on the Supreme Court. Judge Barrett brings a clear record of interpreting the Constitution as written, not as a judicial activist legislating from the bench.

She calls South Bend home, is a professor at Notre Dame, and was confirmed to her role on the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals in 2017 with a bipartisan majority in the Senate.

This week she met with **Senators Todd Young** and**Mike Braun** – and we can’t wait to see her confirmed by the entire Senate!
---
|
---
| **_Upcoming Events_**
[October 2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=10a1e9b359&e=1acd9bb3d6): Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=deaa75415a&e=1acd9bb3d6): Madison County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c4a571f285&e=1acd9bb3d6): Knox County Annual Spot Shoot
[October 3](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=644cf29d71&e=1acd9bb3d6): Warren County Drive-Thru BBQ

clean_body: While President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump are now safely quarantining at the White House after a positive COVID-19 diagnoses, Hoosiers are | | | | | | | | Praying for a Safe Recovery While President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump are now safely quarantining at the White House after positive COVID-19 diagnoses, Hoosiers are coming together. We're praying for the health and recovery of the First Family, and the health of all with COVID-19. This disease has again proven that no one is immune, and it’s another reminder to focus on good hygiene, social distancing and wearing masks. We’re now just over 30 days away from Election Day, with early voting in person beginning this Tuesday. Indiana’s economy is bouncing back with an unemployment rate that keeps dropping (now 6.4%), and health benchmarks showing that Indiana is making progress. Governor Holcomb shared this week that Indiana's COVID-19 positivity rate is continuing to stay around 4%, while more schools and employers are opening for business. Republican leadership delivers results. Starting on Tuesday, make your voice heard that you want to see this progress continue. Go out and cast your vote for our entire Republican team! -Chairman Kyle Hupfer PHOTO: This week, Chairman Hupfer presented the keynote remarks at the La Porte County Reagan Day Dinner. He talked about Indiana’s Republican leadership, with Governor Holcomb and our Republican legislators making sure Indiana was ready to handle the impacts of COVID-19 – with record job creation, record high wages, low taxes, balanced budgets and a responsible rainy day fund. That same leadership is now working to take Indiana to even greater heights. | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Pro-Life Leadership Yesterday, Governor Holcomb announced some huge news! Thanks to his pro-life leadership, Indiana's infant mortality rate just fell to the lowest level ever recorded in our state’s history. Gov. Holcomb has taken direct and impactful action to protect our state's most vulnerable citizens, including: Implementing Levels of Care certification for perinatal programs at hospitals and birthing centers to ensure that mothers and babies get care at a facility with a level of care that matches their risk. Expanding the Nurse-Family Partnership Program to combat infant mortality rates. Starting Indiana's OB Navigator program that connects pregnant women in Indiana's highest-risk ZIP codes with wraparound health services. There's still work to do on this front, but this news is wonderful for our state. It's just the latest pro-life success story from Governor Holcomb , and that's not to mention the big news just weeks ago that Indiana leads the nation in adoptions out of foster care! To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on , and ! | | | Get Well Soon, Mr. President! This morning, we learned that President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump have tested positive for COVID-19. We know that they’re fighters, and as Hoosiers, we’re all praying for their speedy recovery -- and for the health of all diagnosed! | | | | Todd Rokita Earns Right to Life Endorsement! Indiana Right to Life PAC today announced its endorsement of Todd Rokita for Attorney General!Todd Rokita is a lifetime advocate for the unborn, earning a 100% pro-life voting record as a member of Congress. In addition, Todd Rokita was endorsed by Indiana Right to Life during his two terms as Secretary of State. “Todd Rokita is the pro-life choice for attorney general,” states Indiana Right to Life PAC chairman Mike Fichter. “We have absolute certainty that he will strongly defend Indiana’s pro-life laws in the courts, including future laws as well as those laws already being challenged in the federal courts.” | | | Let’s Support Hoosier Amy Coney Barrett! Last weekend, President Trump nominated a fellow Hoosier, Judge Amy Coney Barrett, an excellent Constitutional conservative, to serve on the Supreme Court. Judge Barrett brings a clear record of interpreting the Constitution as written, not as a judicial activist legislating from the bench. She calls South Bend home, is a professor at Notre Dame, and was confirmed to her role on the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals in 2017 with a bipartisan majority in the Senate. This week she met with Senators Todd Young andMike Braun – and we can’t wait to see her confirmed by the entire Senate! | | Upcoming Events : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner : Madison County Lincoln Day Dinner : Knox County Annual Spot Shoot : Warren County Drive-Thru BBQ : Orange County GOP Annual Fall Dinner : Orange County GOP Patriot Rally : Kosciusko County Republican Fall Fish Fry : Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner : Switzerland County Lincoln Day Dinner : Sullivan County Lincoln Day Dinner : Gibson County Lincoln Day Dinner : Steuben County Lincoln Day Dinner : Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner : Jackson County Lincoln Day Dinner Have an event to add? Please email it to mailto:info@indiana.gop! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt.
