Look, Peter, _CNN_ reported that "it's a *really* big deal that Texas is now a 2020 swing state." Folks all across America are realizing what you and I have known all along: **_Texas is winnable,_ and this is the year we do it. [Pitch in >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cc9/7f51f7bc/44ec4cea/4efbbc62/1343300233/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201002.2ndoabx__2224__&amount=10")**

I'm going to need your help to make it happen. Sen. Cornyn has millions in his war chest, and you can be sure that his corporate PACs, the big-money donors, and the Koch network don't want to see Mitch McConnell's right-hand man lose in November. They're spending left and right to save their spineless bootlicker, but I've got something way better than that. I have this team -- thousands of y'all who care enough to donate their time and money to flip Texas and the Senate.

name: Team Nehls
subject: WATCH: Sheriff Nehls needs your help - do you have his back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi and the national Democrat campaign machine have teamed up with Sri Kulkarni to attack and spread disgusting lies about Sheriff Nehls.

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Welcome to our virtual day of action!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

I’m excited to invite you to one of the biggest voter turnout efforts
ever. On October 12th, the last day before Early Voting begins in Texas,
we will attempt to call more than one million Texas voters to make sure
that they have a plan to vote in the most important election of our lives.

Of course, we’ve named it [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201002-107300&t=1001&akid=107300%2E444211%2Ey1vG4X ]Calling Texas: The Million Voter Phone Bank
and we want YOU to be part of it.

If the country comes through for Texas on this day, then Texas will come
through for the country on election day. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201002-107300&t=1002&akid=107300%2E444211%2Ey1vG4X ]RSVP for Calling Texas: The
Million Voter Phone Bank today and pick up a phone bank shift (or two or
three)!

What I mean by that is, if enough of us make phone calls on October 12th
to registered Democrats in Texas and help them turn out to vote, then
those voters will on November 3rd:

* Elect a Democratic majority to the Texas House for the first time in
20 years (which means we can help draw fair maps and dismantle voter
suppression)
* Help MJ Hegar defeat John Cornyn (which will give Democrats a majority
in the U.S. Senate)
* Make Joe Biden the first Democrat since 1976 to win the Electoral
College votes of Texas (which ends the election on Election Night
instead of dragging it out for weeks)

If you are frustrated, distressed, anxious or depressed about the
election... the state of our democracy... or the future of our country... we
have the antidote for you. Registering, voting, donating, Tweeting — all
that is important. But nothing beats talking to your fellow Americans in
order to help them make a decision to vote. It cuts through the noise, the
TV ads, the social media chatter and gets to the heart of what makes a
democracy work. It’s the tough, necessary work that wins elections, and
this is a golden opportunity for you to take part in it.

I’ve done some serious campaigning in my life. Knocked on tens of
thousands of doors, held thousands of town hall meetings, and visited with
people in every one of the 254 counties of Texas. But I’ve never done
anything quite like this.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201002-107300&t=1003&akid=107300%2E444211%2Ey1vG4X ]I’d love to have you join me on the 12th and be part of making history.
Our country is counting on us.

RSVP for our virtual day of action:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201002-107300&t=1004&akid=107300%2E444211%2Ey1vG4X ]Calling Texas: The Million Voter Phone Bank
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201002-107300&t=1005&akid=107300%2E444211%2Ey1vG4X ]Monday, October 12

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43676?source=ema20201002-107300&t=1006&akid=107300%2E444211%2Ey1vG4X ]Get more info or RSVP »

Let’s get after it,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=107300%2E444211%2Ey1vG4X

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Tom Cotton
subject: China is responsible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
First, I hope you will join me in praying for President Trump, Melania, and all the others impacted by this terrible virus. President Trump is tough, he is a fighter, and he is in our prayers. Let’s remember who is responsible for this virus in the first place: China. If China had taken decisive action to slow the spread, lives would have been saved and the world could have avoided this pandemic. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MDE3NDAS1&kn=3&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDE3MzM4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

First, I hope you will join me in praying for President Trump, Melania, and all the others impacted by this terrible virus.

President Trump is tough, he is a fighter, and he is in our prayers.

Let’s remember who is responsible for this virus in the first place: China.

If China had taken decisive action to slow the spread, lives would have been saved and the world could have avoided this pandemic.

China is responsible for every single death, every infection, every job loss and every retirement plan wiped out.
Sign my Petition: HOLD CHINA ACCOUNTABLE http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MDE3NDAS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDE3MzM4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 China covered up the virus and arrested doctors who tried to warn the world. China corrupted the World Health Organization to downplay the severity of the virus. And China hoarded the world’s supply of protective equipment.

That’s why I will continue to point out that this is the China virus. Millions of people have died because the Chinese Communist Party failed to act.
Sign my Petition: HOLD CHINA ACCOUNTABLE http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM2MDE3NDAS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTg2MDE3MzM4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 We must ensure that something like this never happens again! name: Barbara Bollier
subject: Need a minute to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I know there is a lot going on, but I hope you'll take a second to read this email. This is a pivotal moment in our work to flip Kansas' Senate seat.
**Four polls in a row have shown that this race is a dead heat -- in fact, we're now tied with Republican candidate Roger Marshall.** That's why Mitch McConnell-aligned super PACs and special interests have already thrown close to $10 million Marshall's way to attack me. But I have a secret weapon that the GOP doesn't: the support of this incredible grassroots team.
Team, this race is in a dead heat, and we HAVE to start October off strong. To do that, we need just 3 more contributions from 03264 today. [**Can I count on your $3 contribution to help me flip Kansas?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc547/2a380d31/20c35cdf/f0b78a/2153547964/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMDAyX01XSDRCQl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20201002_MWH4BB_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
The election is just a month away, and every single day of fundraising is critical from here on out. We can't miss this opportunity to prove the strength of our grassroots movement -- and show the Republicans that we're ready to win this fight on November 3.
I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important. I need this team standing with me now more than ever.
[**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can right now.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc547/2a380d31/20c35cdf/f0b78a/2153547964/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMDAyX01XSDRCQl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20201002_MWH4BB_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you,
Barbara
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc547/2a380d31/20c35cdf/f0b78a/2153547964/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMDAyX01XSDRCQl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20201002_MWH4BB_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Join Us on the Road!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

Our team is hitting the road with the Kansas GOP "Keep Kansas Great" bus tour, will you be joining us?

We are arriving in **Hutchinson on Saturday, October 3** at the State Fair Grounds to kick off our tour with a baked potato and dessert bar and special appearances by Dr. Roger Marshall, Attorney General Derek Schmidt, former Kansas Governor Jeff Colyer, and senate district 34 candidate Dr. Mark Steffen.

Below is the tour schedule for this weekend, I hope to see you there!

_Keep Kansas Great Bus Tour_
* **Sat. 10/03 Hutchinson, KS** : Kansas State Fair Grounds, Encampment Building, 5pm - 7pm baked potato & dessert bar. 7:30pm guest speakers.
* **Sun. 10/04 Liberal, KS** : Conestoga Atrium, 11am - 11:30am.
* **Sun. 10/04 Dodge City, KS** : Ford County GOP Headquarters, 1pm - 1:30pm.
* **Sun. 10/04 Garden City, KS** : Wind River Grain, 2:45pm - 3:30pm
* **Sun. 10/04 Colby, KS** : Farm Credit of Western Kansas, 5:30pm - 6pm.

To find out if the Keep Kansas Great bus tour is coming to a city near you, visit the Kansas GOP **[website](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=981f92afe7&e=a9d1410029)** or check out their Facebook page, Kansas Republican Party.

Thank you for your support not only for myself, but for all Kansas Republican candidates. Together, we will Keep Kansas Great!

Yours in the fight,

Tracey

subject: 15,000 registration checks, plus a recap of Tuesday's debate 🗳
body:
We helped 15,000 voters check their registration during our Day of Action last week! | | |
---
| | | | [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=2789ec5321&e=0aad15100c)

**This Week in Democracy:**

---
| [ ](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=33be6559ef&e=0aad15100c)
---

Results from last week's Day of Action are in: 15,000 voters checked their registration through Outvote on National Voter Registration Day! Plus, we hosted several Instagram Live conversations between digital personalities and Outvote partners like Planned Parenthood and ACLU. [Our latest blog post](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=7aeac37023&e=0aad15100c) recaps the event, including links to watch (or rewatch!) each of the conversations for extra motivation to GOTV.

| [READ THE RECAP](https://outvote.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc952a46675058f5f7e2d3a0a&id=2eca67303b&e=0aad15100c "READ THE RECAP")

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: REMINDER: Join Our Day Of Action Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**REMINDER: Join Our Day Of Action Tomorrow!**

We are in the final stretch of the 2020 campaign cycle and we need your help to share our message with friends and neighbors throughout the 7th District.

We hope you will join Wesley and the rest of **Team Hunt for a Day of Action tomorrow, October 3rd.**

**_Where_** : There are three locations you can choose between:

1\. 11511 Katy Freeway, Suite #105, 77079
2\. 16000 Dillard Drive, Suite C, 77040
3\. 3710 Bellefontaine Street, 77025

**_When_** : 10:00am, Saturday, October 3rd

**_What_** : Block walking, phone banking, and text banking to spread the word and energize voters to support Wesley on Election Day

If you would like to attend or have any questions, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com.

We hope to see you there!

Thank you,
Team Hunt

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
September Jobs Numbers Best Since Reagan-Era, Don't Panic America; Liberals Should Love Amy Coney Barrett; Cuts in Policing Has 'Led to 710 Murders... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cdd349433a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**September Jobs Numbers Best Since Reagan-Era, Don't Panic America**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=065d08b5d5&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.foxbusiness.com/economy/september-jobs-numbers-andy-puzder")
-Fox Business
America added 661,000 jobs last month, according to today’s jobs report, while the unemployment rate fell to 7.9 percent. “You may read elsewhere about an economic slowdown but September’s very positive jobs numbers actually confirm that we are still experiencing the most dynamic economic recovery in American history,” Andy Puzder writes.

**BY THE NUMBERS** : [**September Jobs Report Shows American Grit**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be22c19667&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Cuts in Policing Have 'Led to 710 Murders and More Than 2,800 Gunshot Victims' Across the US**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97492b5e17&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Daily Mail Online_
“Major cities across the United States are seeing a 'dramatic and widespread spikes in homicides' after police funding cuts,” Lauren Fruen reports. University of Utah Law Professor Paul Cassell dubbed this rise in crime the “Minneapolis effect,” explaining that “as a result of de-policing during June and July 2020, approximately 710 additional victims were murdered and more than 2,800 victims were shot.”
---
|
---
| [**Liberals Should Love Amy Coney Barrett**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d9a8771fe&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Washington Times_
“Liberals should love Amy Coney Barrett. As an independent woman who has held prestigious positions in legal academia, private practice and the judiciary, she embodies the ideal of professional excellence for feminists . . . If tenacious women like Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg prepared the way for women to practice law, formidable women like Judge Amy Coney Barrett have paved it,” attorney Kelly Tshibaka writes.

**WATCH:**[**Supreme Court belongs to all Americans, Judge Barrett says**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb6c3be6c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**NBC News Misrepresents Internal DHS Memo About Their Response to the Kyle Rittenhouse Case**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5f5dc2e859&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Townhall_
“NBC News misrepresented an internal memo given to Department of Homeland Security officials that was meant to brief them on the Kyle Rittenhouse situation the week it occurred in August. NBC News reported ‘officials were directed to make public comments sympathetic’ about Rittenhouse and it included quotes from the document.” In reality, these “‘sympathetic’ talking points were not talking points at all,” Julio Rosas reports.
---
|
---
| [**Trump Nominated a Third Time for Nobel Peace Prize**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=49e2b3e2aa&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“President Trump has received a third nomination for the Nobel Peace Prize,” Aris Folley reports. “Four Australian law professors recently nominated the president for the high honor, with one of them, David Flint, citing his recent role in helping broker relations between Israel and the United Arab Emirates (UAE).”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec7fd43449&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0c48e9d64&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=9076bda2d7)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Halloween guidelines
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Earlier this week I announced that there will be Halloween this year. In times like this, we need fun, levity, and a sense of community more than ever. Like everything else, it will look different. We'll all need to make some changes and take extra precautions, but we can still make this a fun, safe evening for our kids.
I want to encourage everyone to be safe and thoughtful about how you celebrate. If you have an older relative at home, or you live in a higher-density community, consider staying home and watching a movie, or doing a virtual pumpkin carving with friends. If you go out and it's crowded, turn around. Let's all be safe and make sure the choices we make on Halloween don't result in the need for new restrictions a couple weeks later. If you do go out to trick-or-treat, here's some guidance for you:
For trick-or-treaters: The first rule of Halloween (and all of our activities) is that if you are feeling sick, you have to stay home. That includes both parents and kids. No amount of candy is worth the risk of getting someone sick. You should check in with your children before you leave the house to make sure they any COVID-19 symptoms.
When you do go trick-or-treating, only go with the people you are already in regular contact with instead of introducing new people into your pod. Make sure you bring hand sanitizer as well to use between houses, and wear a cloth mask. This has to be the same mask you wear normally -- your costume mask is not designed to contain airborne particles, and it will not keep you or your neighbors safe.
For those handing out treats: We can't open the door and offer a shared bowl for kids to stick their hands inside. Leave individually wrapped goodie bags or single pieces of candy out for kids to take while you stay inside. Make sure you wash your hands before putting out anything for kids to touch.
We've posted guidance online about Halloween and about fall activities more generally, such as apple picking, farmer's markets, and hayrides. You can find all of this guidance on [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E2qNozQKlxlPyEQrLh9-JSEr7abYdjTvctgqyL7AIJZGo2feAG0VlFGKUxSYtmFUe8m_kOdClPorsOtRTg0enkXUIJJHKZ6aeXrs0MH51kYW-Bf4URSXbfkpCeY8VJUpyJzAHglXXWYQ1hEQx3ejIQ==&c=ULdcVAcJRztp6efVixPgttFhf3GcR5XMufVtpRMoI3KL2n3CM7hrYQ==&ch=ho11Y3sN2-QCRB_nJXXkWvsx8fyW20QPivaZOxFJmd6f0ArADAQOqA==) under Parks and Recreation.
Please start making a plan now about how you'll celebrate Halloween in a safe, fun way. And as always, feel free to reply to this email and let me know about what you're planning!
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001E2qNozQKlxlPyEQrLh9-JSEr7abYdjTvctgqyL7AIJZGo2feAG0VlGt0iCs0y4AVNSh3XLJLYTA59lwfPmzmOv8FjpP9M1VE99soKjWe9Kyjtv1cjXGoBbcHnnPR8R947ifZg0CfBrOGDh_NhHlGMJmimPiDXdu1Ahw8iDrK8Z86nhX9epdWLkPnXRK9L9VXCWNmcH_uDQaoF3Sp3c3TH4s8MJkKGAND_Bns2Unvur9Xj3DI9inUAlR6o83wdSk6KURxnL6417qbZYL9BghykH95thna5hqdxCU0zbHys9zj6_8EVZ0ZZnCDkblDUR6I3a9YFgi1OIY=&c=ULdcVAcJRztp6efVixPgttFhf3GcR5XMufVtpRMoI3KL2n3CM7hrYQ==&ch=ho11Y3sN2-QCRB_nJXXkWvsx8fyW20QPivaZOxFJmd6f0ArADAQOqA==).
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Hello friend, Earlier this week I announced that there will be Halloween this year. In times like this, we need fun, levity, and a sense of community more than ever. Like everything else, it will look different. We'll all need to make some changes and take extra precautions, but we can still make this a fun, safe evening for our kids. I want to encourage everyone to be safe and thoughtful about how you celebrate. If you have an older relative at home, or you live in a higher-density community, consider staying home and watching a movie, or doing a virtual pumpkin carving with friends. If you go out and it's crowded, turn around. Let's all be safe and make sure the choices we make on Halloween don't result in the need for new restrictions a couple weeks later. If you do go out to trick-or-treat, here's some guidance for you: For trick-or-treaters: The first rule of Halloween (and all of our activities) is that if you are feeling sick, you have to stay home. That includes both parents and kids. No amount of candy is worth the risk of getting someone sick. You should check in with your children before you leave the house to make sure they any COVID-19 symptoms. When you do go trick-or-treating, only go with the people you are already in regular contact with instead of introducing new people into your pod. Make sure you bring hand sanitizer as well to use between houses, and wear a cloth mask. This has to be the same mask you wear normally -- your costume mask is not designed to contain airborne particles, and it will not keep you or your neighbors safe. For those handing out treats: We can't open the door and offer a shared bowl for kids to stick their hands inside. Leave individually wrapped goodie bags or single pieces of candy out for kids to take while you stay inside. Make sure you wash your hands before putting out anything for kids to touch. We've posted guidance online about Halloween and about fall activities more generally, such as apple picking, farmer's markets, and hayrides. You can find all of this guidance on == under Parks and Recreation. Please start making a plan now about how you'll celebrate Halloween in a safe, fun way. And as always, feel free to reply to this email and let me know about what you're planning! We're all in this together. -Gina Raimondo Governor P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Pray for President Trump and the First Lady
body:
| | Peter, News broke this morning that President Donald Trump and the First Lady have both tested positive for coronavirus. The responses are varied. While some politicians and leaders have offered words of support, other political foes have disgustingly celebrated and jeered at the news. **As Christians, our response should be unified and powerful. We must pray.** **[You must pray.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KnxDCHUIVrjEhKxLEC9xLcJ-NpgB20woRV-EDver0wo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201002pry01&n=1)** 1 Timothy 2:1-4 instructs believers to pray for all those who are in authority. Amid a heated election season and with critical issues at the forefront of peoples’ minds, including the Supreme Court, the economy, religious freedom, and others, our leaders need our prayers. Would you join us in **[praying this simple prayer](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KnxDCHUIVrjEhKxLEC9xLcJ-NpgB20woRV-EDver0wo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201002pry01&n=2)** and then send a note to President Trump and the First Lady, along with Vice President Pence and the Second Lady and let them know you are praying for them? [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KnxDCHUIVrjEhKxLEC9xLcJ-NpgB20woRV-EDver0wo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201002pry01&n=3) Our easy-to-use tool will help you send a pre-written note to the Trump and Pence families right now. While much of the country turns to confusion and fear, as Christians, we turn to prayer and faith. Please take just **[two minutes to pray and send this important note of encouragement.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KnxDCHUIVrjEhKxLEC9xLcJ-NpgB20woRV-EDver0wo&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201002pry01&n=4)** **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201002pry01&n=5)
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201002pry01&n=6)

name: Preston, MJ Hegar Campaign Manager
subject: This is big news on our fundraising →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's better than we could have imagined.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd5/7f51f7bc/44e1f244/4efba0d0/935525731/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | We just got in our fundraising numbers for the third quarter, Peter, and here's the deal: We're leveling the playing field in Texas. We gained incredible momentum last quarter thanks to this team -- **raising over $13.5 MILLION. Now, we 've GOT to keep that momentum going.** | [KEEP IT GOING](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cd5/7f51f7bc/44e1f244/4efba0d7/935525731/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20201002.3nd__2246__&amount=10")
---

**Here 's a quick snapshot of what that means:**
* That's more than Sen. Cornyn raised in the last four quarters _combined_.
* It's almost 8x more than our last best fundraising quarter!
* We can reach more undecided voters than we ever expected with the money we've raised.

---
We should all be proud of this, Peter. But here's the truth: we still can't stop.

Sometime in the next few days, Sen. Cornyn will release his own numbers and there's no doubt they'll be big too. His corporate PAC allies have seen the same polling we have -- showing MJ statistically tied with Cornyn -- and they know they need to make big moves to save their man in the Senate.

They're pulling out ALL the stops to prop him up, and that's not to mention the super PACs pouring millions into Texas to support him!

With 32 days left, we need your help to keep pace. **Can I count on you, Peter?**

subject: Week in Review

body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| [](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=02ed730113&e=68aaeb0998)Peter,

The presidential debates aren't the only debates happening! I'm excited to announce that we’re having our first debate on October 12th.

Hosted by AJC and Temple Shalom, this Zoom debate will take place the day before Early Voting starts. I hope you’ll watch and cheer me on, or if you’re undecided, I hope I’ll earn your vote.

Follow this link to register to watch: [https://tinyurl.com/tx32debate](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=2f198b5ae2&e=68aaeb0998)

In other exciting news, new signs are in! We've got multiple designs and multiple sizes to choose from. There's surely one that's right for you.

Let us know if you’d like one! From Wylie to Garland to North Dallas, we love seeing our signs all over the 32nd Congressional District.

Finally, I'd like to make sure you're aware that Monday, October 5th is the deadline to register to vote or change you[](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=06514034da&e=68aaeb0998)r registration. It's incredibly important that you are able to vote in this critical election.

[Follow this link](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=d0d69defd0&e=68aaeb0998) to register or check your registration status right now.

Early Voting is right around the corner and Election Day will be here before we know it, so please make sure you're registered!

Thank you for your support, and I hope you have a great weekend!
---
| God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: This is a love letter
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3a9be4cd0288/this-is-a-love-letter?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |

My team sometimes teases me about the reverent tone I take when describing this district.

The truth is that I’ve lived a lot of places and I love this place best.

My family moved here when I was thirteen from Ft. Hood, Texas, and I remember waking up in the backseat of our Volvo station wagon, looking out the window at the gently rolling farmland, and thinking I’d found heaven. That feeling hasn’t gone away.

**Part of the reason I’m running for Congress is to protect this place that is my home** \-- the blue herons on the I&M Canal, the Starved Rock State Park vistas, the corn and soybeans that are baked into our identity.

I understand the appeal of mountains and oceans. I’ve lived in swampland with Spanish moss and honeysuckle. I know the buzz of the city. But the big sky and the clear stars; the wind farms and the rivers and the creeks; the winding gravel roads...the landscape of this place...this is my home.

I’m running for Congress to sustain it. [Will you pitch in to help me do that?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f26d4b9f93&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani
